Let me start by reading the file to understand its current structure.

Now let me analyze the migration rule and the file:

**Migration Rule**: `sd-cf-descriptionlist-descriptionlist-req-group` — The `DescriptionList` component requires `DescriptionListGroup` as children in PF v6. Currently, the children of `<DescriptionList>` are various detail item components directly, without being wrapped in `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

**Plan:**
1. Import `DescriptionListGroup` from `@patternfly/react-core` (add to existing import)
2. Wrap all children of `<DescriptionList>` inside a `<DescriptionListGroup>` component

Looking at the children, they are all direct children of `<DescriptionList>` — various `*DetailsItem` components and a conditional block. In PF v6, `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` children. The simplest correct fix is to wrap all the children in a single `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

Let me apply the changes:

arguments.after:
<DescriptionList
        columnModifier={{
          default: '2Col',
        }}
      >
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <TypeDetailsItem resource={provider} />

          {/* Avoid displaying the external web ui link for the local cluster */}
          {provider?.spec?.url ? (
            <ExternalManagementLinkDetailsItem
              resource={provider}
              canPatch={permissions.canPatch}
              webUILinkText={t(`OpenShift web console UI`)}
              webUILink={getOpenshiftProviderWebUILink(provider)}
            />
          ) : (
            <DetailsItem title={''} content={''} />
          )}

          <NameDetailsItem resource={provider} />
          <NamespaceDetailsItem resource={provider} />
          <URLDetailsItem
            resource={provider}
            canPatch={permissions.canPatch}
            helpContent={t(
              'URL of the Openshift Virtualization API endpoint. Empty might be used for the host provider.',
            )}
          />
          <CredentialsDetailsItem resource={provider} />
          <CreatedAtDetailsItem resource={provider} />
          <TransferNetworkDetailsItem resource={provider} canPatch={permissions.canPatch} />
          <OwnerDetailsItem resource={provider} />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
      </DescriptionList>
arguments.before:
<DescriptionList
        columnModifier={{
          default: '2Col',
        }}
      >
        <TypeDetailsItem resource={provider} />

        {/* Avoid displaying the external web ui link for the local cluster */}
        {provider?.spec?.url ? (
          <ExternalManagementLinkDetailsItem
            resource={provider}
            canPatch={permissions.canPatch}
            webUILinkText={t(`OpenShift web console UI`)}
            webUILink={getOpenshiftProviderWebUILink(provider)}
          />
        ) : (
          <DetailsItem title={''} content={''} />
        )}

        <NameDetailsItem resource={provider} />
        <NamespaceDetailsItem resource={provider} />
        <URLDetailsItem
          resource={provider}
          canPatch={permissions.canPatch}
          helpContent={t(
            'URL of the Openshift Virtualization API endpoint. Empty might be used for the host provider.',
          )}
        />
        <CredentialsDetailsItem resource={provider} />
        <CreatedAtDetailsItem resource={provider} />
        <TransferNetworkDetailsItem resource={provider} canPatch={permissions.canPatch} />
        <OwnerDetailsItem resource={provider} />
      </DescriptionList>
